conbody.p:
Overview: This report displays the activity performed by the CDS in the last 48 hours including today's date. This report displays activity data only for CDS, CDS Manager or Nuance admin.
For example, when you open the report on 9/12/2021 at 4 PM EST, the report displays the activities performed in the last 48 hours - 9/10/2021 4PM - 9/12/2021 4PM.
No date slicer is displayed and you cannot modify the date range

A real-time ‘Activity Details’ report is needed for the following:
A CDS Manager can concurrently view and analyze the details around the activities performed by the CDSs.
A CDS can view and analyze their productivity concurrently.

This reports answers the following business questions:
How soon after admission the initial review was performed?
What is the average TAT of initial reviews?
What is the detail around the reviews?
How many total reviews were performed?
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDS General CDS Productivity Activity Details - Last 48 Hours .

The report displays the following:
KPI cards: Initial Reviews, Additional Reviews, Total Reviews, Avg. Initial Review TAT (Hours)
Activity Details Tabular Chart
On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets filtered in charts.
For filters on all pages, refer .
Info Icon(Text on hover): Displays the activity performed by the CDS in the last 48 hours.

fig.title: Sample Report
fig.note: This screenshot serves as a representation to understand how values will be presented in the column.

entry.p: This metric displays the count of encounters with an initial review date/time in the last 48 hours.

Example: For last 48 hours Activity date, this metric displays the total count of initial reviews done by the CDS.
Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range, i.e. 48 hours.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Format: 9

This KPI metric displays the count of encounters with an initial review date/time in the last 48 hours. Example: For last 48 hours Activity date, this metric displays the total count of additional reviews done by the CDS.
Additional Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Activity Type 'Post-Discharge Reviews' is not considered as an Additional Review by the CDS.
Additional Reviews for Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Format: 15

row.entry:
This metric displays 'Avg. Initial Review TAT (Hours)' for the last 48 hours.
The number of hours between encounter Admit Date/time and the date/time the Working Review was first created.
(Initial Review TAT (hours) for an encounter = Initial Review Date/Time- Admit Date/Time) hours.
Formula: Avg. Initial Review TAT(Hours) = Sum of Initial Review TAT(Hours) of all the reviewed encounters / Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews).Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Format: 150

p.b: Activity Detail - CDS Activity Detail Tabular Chart

table.title: CDS Activity Detail Table Column and Description

row.entry: Displays the name of the CDS who performed the activity in the selected Activity Date Range. Format: CDS Name (CDS ID).
Displays facility assigned to the encounter. Format: Facility Description.
Displays the Account Number assigned to the encounter.
Displays the MRN assigned to the encounter.
Displays the name of the patient associated with the encounter. Patient name is displayed in the format: Last Name, First Name.
Displays the Admission Date and Time assigned to the encounter in the facility's timezone. Format: 08/08/2019 12:00:00 AM MST.

entry.p: Displays the Discharge Date and Time assigned to the encounter in the facility's timezone.
This column is blank for the encounters that do not have a discharge date assigned.

row.entry: Displays the Length of Stay of the patient.Same logic as Encounter Details - YES.

entry.p: Displays the Activity Date considering facility's timezone. Format : 08/08/2019 (MM/DD/YYYY).
Data in the report is sorted by the Activity Date in descending order.
entry.note: Time component is not displayed with the date as there can be multiple activities on the same encounter on the same day.

row.entry:
Displays the name of the activity(s) performed by the Activity CDS.
Format: Comma Separated
Worksheet creation or modification
Working review creation
Working review modification
Clarification creation
Clarification modification
Encounter creation or modification
Encounter Saved
Encounter status modification
Note creation or modification
Possible review creation
Possible review modification
Reconciliation assessment creation
Reconciliation assessment modification
Tracking Codes Addition or Modification
Activity Type- Post Discharge Review - is not applicable for this report.
Multiple activities performed on the same day are displayed in the comma-separated format.

entry.p: Displays the date and time when the initial review was performed on the encounter.
The date must be in the Facility's time-zone. This column is blank for the encounters that do not have an initial review date.
If the Initial Review Date/time is after the Discharge Date/Time, Initial Review Date/Time is displayed in the red font.

row.entry:
Displays the name of the CDS who performed the initial review.
Format: Last Name, First Name MI (CDS ID).
This column is blank for the encounters that do not have a ‘Initial Review Date/Time'.

entry.p: Displays the Initial Review TAT (Hours) for the selected period.

row.entry: Initial Review TAT (hours) for an encounter = Initial Review Date/Time - Admit Date/Time (hours).
Displays the name of the CDS assigned to the encounter. Format: CDS Name (CDS ID).

Displays the Encounter Status assigned to the encounter.
Encounters with the Status 'Review Not Needed' are not displayed by default. You can select 'Review Not Needed' options from the 'Encounter Status' filter to analyze the Review Not Needed encounters.
Displays the rank assigned to the encounter prior to the Initial Review. Example 1, 2, etc. This column is blank for the encounters that do not have a ‘Rank at Initial Review' assigned.
Displays the current rank assigned to the encounter. Example 1, 2, etc. This column is blank for the encounters that do not have a Current Rank assigned.
Displays the 'primary' Working DRG along with the description displayed on the Review page. This column is blank for the encounters that do not have a ‘Initial Review Date/Time'
This column displays the WT associated with the 'primary' Working DRG displayed on the Review page. Example: 1.0393.

Displays the 'primary' Possible DRG along with the description displayed on the Review page.
This column is blank for the encounters that do not have a ‘Initial Review Date/Time' and if there is no Possible DRG assigned to the encounter.

Displays the WT associated with the 'primary' Possible DRG displayed on the Review page. Example: 1.0393. This column is blank for the encounters that do not have a ‘Initial Review Date/Time' and if there is no Possible DRG assigned to the encounter.

Displays both code and description of the Reconciliation Assessment DRG along with the description displayed on the Reconciliation page.Example: 872 - SEPTICEMIA OR SEVERE SEPSIS WITHOUT MV >96 HOURS WITHOUT MAJOR COMPLICATION OR COMORBIDITY (MCC).

entry.p: This column displays the WT associated with the Reconciliation Assessment DRG displayed on the Reconciliation page.

row.entry:
Displays both code and description of the Final Coded DRG along with the description displayed on the Reconciliation page.
Example: 872 - SEPTICEMIA OR SEVERE SEPSIS WITHOUT MV >96 HOURS WITHOUT MAJOR COMPLICATION OR COMORBIDITY (MCC).This column is blank for the encounters that do not have a ‘Initial Review Date/Time'.

entry.p: This column displays the WT associated with the Final Coded DRG displayed on the Reconciliation page.
This column is blank for the encounters that do not have a ‘Initial Review Date/Time'.

row.entry: Displays the Payer assigned to the encounter in the format Payer Description (Payer ID).
Displays the Unit assigned to the encounter.
Displays the Patient Type assigned to the encounter.
Displays the Visit Type assigned to the encounter.

Displays both active and inactive facilities in alphabetical order that the report user has access to.
You can select multiple facilities.
You can search the facility by Facility ID or Description.
Format: Facility Description (Facility ID)
Default: ALL

Displays both active and inactive payers in alphabetical order associated with the facilities user has access to.
You can select multiple payers.
"Unassigned Payer" displays data for the encounters that do not have a payer assigned.
You can search the Payer by Payer ID or Description.
Format: Payer Description (Payer ID)
Default: ALL

ul.li: Displays the list of available units.
You can select multiple Units.
You can search the Unit.
Default: ALL
This filter displays both active and inactive CDSs in alphabetical order associated with the facilities user has access to.
The CDS Filter in all the reports displays the users with at-least CDS or CDS Manager role assigned.
"Unassigned CDS" displays data for the encounters that do not have a CDS assigned.
Format: Last Name, First Name MI (CDS ID)
Default: ALL
Displays the available patient types. Example: Inpatient, Outpatient.
Default: Inpatient
Displays the list of available Visit Types.
You can select multiple Visit Type.
You can search the Visit Type.
Default: ALL.
Displays the list of available Encounter Statuses.
You can select multiple Encounter Statuses.
You can search the Encounter Status.
Default: Review Not Needed unchecked by default
Displays the list of available admit service.
You can select multiple admit service.
You can search the admit service.
Default: ALL.

row.entry:
Avg. Initial Review TAT(Hours) = Sum of Initial Review TAT(Hours) of all the reviewed encounters / Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews.
Initial Review TAT (hours) for an encounter = Initial Review Date/Time- Admit Date/Time) hours. For example, 28
Displays Initial Review Date/time in red font when the Initial Review Date/Time > Discharge Date/Time.
Displays rank assigned to the encounter prior to Initial Review.
